Unit Composition --- 1 Tyrannocyte

;Options

**Five {{Barbed Strangler||$:/templates/tooltips}}s --- 25 points
**Five {{Venom Cannon||$:/templates/tooltips}}s --- 25 points 
*May take options from the {{Biomorphs||$:/templates/tooltips}} list.
title: Tyrannocyte
creator: Jeanbeaux
special-rules: [[Transport Spore]] [[Drifting Death]] [[Instinctive Fire]] [[Dropped from Orbit]] [[Deep Strike]] [[Fearless]] +[sort[title]]
description: Despite being classified as a "Heavy Support" choice, a Tyrannocyte //does not// use up a slot on the Force Organisation Chart. See the [[Transport Spore]] special rule, below, for more information.
